title: Playground Library
concept: A saved-sites-first dashboard where temporary and browser-backed Playgrounds are the primary objects, creation and portability are actions on the library, and the active WordPress site only expands after a Playground is selected.
focus: saved-sites library as the first viewport
tabbed workspace instead of modal stacks
Blueprint author workflow with library, gallery, blueprint editor, and export handoff
dark diagnostics surface with light operational cards
flows: Browse saved and unsaved Playgrounds, select one, then open its preview or Site Manager
Create from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, zip import, featured blueprints, or the full Blueprint gallery
Save temporary work in browser storage or a local directory with visible file-copy progress
Use Site Manager tabs for settings, file browsing, Blueprint editing, database tools, logs, and additional actions
Export to GitHub, download a zip, import a zip, copy Blueprint links, download Blueprint bundles, and run Blueprints
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
understand destructive reset and stored Save & Reload behavior
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
